What We Build

Four verticals. One partner.

Whether you run a school in Indore or a trading business in Barwani — Veerexa has the exact software you need.

🏫
School Management Software

Complete school ERP — admissions, fees, attendance, exams, timetable, library, and a parent app. Trusted by 2,500+ schools across India.

Learn more →
📦
Inventory Management Software

Real-time stock tracking, GST billing, purchase orders, barcode scanning, and supplier management. Built for Indian SMEs — starting at ₹999/month.

Learn more →
💻
Custom Software Development

End-to-end custom web apps, mobile apps, and APIs built to your exact business requirements. Modern stack. On-time delivery.

Learn more →
📈
SEO & Digital Marketing

Rank on Google. Get found on ChatGPT and Perplexity. Content strategy, technical SEO, and local marketing for Indian businesses.

Learn more →
